creator: rashiki@yahoo.com
text:
Thanks for any help in figuring this out. Trying this build this port on a digital ocean box. I'm hoping that if I can get it installed, I will be able to use the webkit2png script found at http://www.paulhammond.org/webkit2png/ to take website screenshots.

I am also having an issue building the www/py-qt4-webkit port.

I'm following instructions found at https://github.com/AdamN/python-webkit2png/

Thanks again, hope it is something simple!
